docs.content: guia de despliegue del binario musubi en el servidor con systemd, restorecon y reinicio del servicio
the release pipeline builds cross platform binaries and publishes assets on a version tag push
fixed a crash bug in the vector index when the embedding dimension mismatched between models
resuelto el fallo en produccion que tiraba el daemon al reconstruir el indice vectorial
el respaldo diario usa vacuum into para un snapshot consistente que se copia fuera del host
disaster recovery runbook how to restore the central memory database from a snapshot
per principal bearer tokens are hashed with sha256 and stored in the principals registry file
cada miembro del equipo tiene su credencial revocable y el registro guarda el hash no el token crudo
recall fuses six signals with reciprocal rank fusion keyword recency frequency vector graph and cooccurrence
la busqueda semantica usa embeddings de una tabla estatica model free en inferencia sin red ni cgo
full text search over observations uses sqlite fts5 with a sanitized match query joined to the rows
the engine serializes writes and allows concurrent reads under a single read write mutex
los hooks capturan memoria automaticamente al terminar un turno de trabajo sin herramienta explicita
el sistema de tokens devuelve gists cortos e hidrata el contenido completo solo si el agente lo pide
the ivf vector index partitions embeddings into k means cells to avoid a full scan at scale
el aislamiento por proyecto acota el recall al project id derivado de la credencial del cliente
the central server force redacts every ingested secret fail closed regardless of the declared scope
the brain listens only on the tailnet and wireguard encrypts the traffic between the mesh peers
musubi provision deja la maquina lista con el cerebro las skills los repos y las herramientas de desarrollo
skills are reusable capability packs discovered and resolved per project from a registry
la consolidacion fusiona observaciones casi duplicadas por encima de un umbral de similitud del coseno
salience decays on an ebbinghaus forgetting curve and low salience old memories get archived
schema migrations run inside a transaction with rollback and refuse to open a newer schema version
personalized pagerank over the relation graph favors the most central memories during recall
el onboarding configura la consola en utf8 y habilita los colores en la terminal de windows
the threat model documents the trust boundary the assets and the mitigations for the central node
